prose: The frontier-orbitals calculation on furan using DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase has completed successfully. The computed HOMO-LUMO gap is approximately 6.25736 eV. Summary of the method used: - Property: frontier orbitals (HOMO and LUMO energies) - Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP - Geometry: optimized at the specified level - Environment: gas phase (no solvent) - Charge: 0, Multiplicity: 1 - Software backend: PySCF. If you need further details or other properties, please let me know.
